focused_unit_note: SBS is the camera-focus / middle slot; all rendered popups are hers. Charge Rocket Launcher, Burst III, Wind element.

video.recording_tail: ends on iOS control-center overlay after OPERATION COMPLETE; per-unit breakdown chart never opened

fight_window.note: first damage tick 507,045 at t=8 (timer 02:59); OPERATION COMPLETE screen appears ~t=190

matchup.boss_element_evidence: enemy HP-bar icons are blue snowflakes; matches documented WATER control target
matchup.advantage: NEUTRAL (Wind vs Water = no advantage either way) — intended control condition
matchup.boss_hp_bar: none (damage-race HUD, TOTAL DAMAGE counter). On-screen segmented snowflake meter = boss stagger/part gauge, NOT HP.

roster.note: 5-unit team; per-unit damage screen NOT shown, so only descriptive/burst-name ID.

units.evidence: dark-teal hair; burst banner 'Siren's Song'; matches control-little-mermaid.json (LM, Burst I)
blonde + laurel crown; burst banner 'Last Kingdom'; MG ammo 299/300; Burst II
pink/silver hair, red bodysuit, charge RL; camera-focus; her popups render
light-blue hair, white/gold beachwear, ornate sniper rifle (ammo 4/6); alternate Burst III producing mid-cycle spikes
documented control core is LM+Crown+Helm; a lavender/purple support glimpsed but not cleanly ID'd

totals.per_unit_note: OPERATION COMPLETE showed TOTAL DAMAGE only; chart icon (per-unit breakdown) never tapped before recording ended. SBS per-unit total NOT recoverable from this video.
totals.attribution_caveat: Running counter is TEAM total. SBS overwhelmingly dominates the 6 red burst windows; the ~28M mid-cycle spikes are the SR carry's burst.

full_bursts.team_fb_evidence: 'FULL BURST!' yellow-hazard banner + 10s countdown confirmed at both red-window starts and mid-cycle spikes
full_bursts.sbs_burst_evidence: red screen tint + SBS charged-shot spam (2-8M popups) present ONLY in these 6 windows; total-damage math (6x~175M + baseline + 6 carry spikes ~= 1.916B) rules out 12 SBS bursts
full_bursts.alternate_carry_note: FULL BURST triggered by the SR carry (Burst III); single +26-31M team spike, no red tint, SBS just auto-fires

sbs_burst_window_deltas_teamcounter.note: team-counter delta across each SBS red window (pre-second -> post-second); SBS-dominated

sbs_charged_shot.core_evidence: red 'CORE HIT' label over charged-shot popups both in-burst (e.g. 2,984,122) and out-of-burst (e.g. ~713,009)
sbs_charged_shot.crit_evidence: orange popups with crit icon (e.g. in-burst 2,455,317; out-of-burst ~420,729)
sbs_charged_shot.in_burst_note: popups heavily overlap (charged-body + core + S1 distributed land together); exact per-popup attribution not cleanly separable. Largest (8.29M) likely core-crit charged shot or 750% S1 distributed proc.
sbs_charged_shot.out_of_burst_cadence_s: ~0.8-1.0 per charged shot (charge ~0.3s + release latency + recovery), consistent with engine charge model
sbs_charged_shot.ammo_note: SBS RL ammo counter hidden behind her kneeling model (center); could not directly count charged shots. Visible center readouts belong to Crown (299/300 MG) and others (6x/120, 4/6).

s1_charge_ladder.outside_burst: periodic large distributed popups observed (250/500/750% class) punctuating normal charged shots; 3rd/6th/9th cadence consistent with kit but not cleanly isolated from overlap
s1_charge_ladder.in_burst: S1 cadence drops to 1/2/3 -> big distributed procs land on ~every charge; multiple large (2-8M) procs per red window (dense, exact count obscured by overlap)

damage_counter_series_per_second.note: t (s from video start) -> cumulative TOTAL DAMAGE; values with ~ were obscured by FULL BURST banner overlay

confidence_summary.team_total: high (read directly from OPERATION COMPLETE + counter)
